task_completion.description: Open the vuln_scan_results.xlsx file in a spreadsheet application
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) is open displaying the vuln_scan_results.xlsx file with the Scan_Data sheet visible.

task_completion.description: Populate Environment, Impact, Base_Score, Exploit_Maturity, and Team_Owner columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: Columns D, E, F, G, and H in the Scan_Data sheet are populated with data corresponding to Environment, Impact, Base_Score, Exploit_Maturity, and Team_Owner.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Adjusted_Score in Column I
task_completion.visual_evidence: Column I in the Scan_Data sheet is populated with numerical values representing the Adjusted_Score (capped at 10.0).
Column J in the Scan_Data sheet is populated with values 3, 14, or 30 representing the SLA_Days.

task_completion.description: Create a new sheet named Remediation_Summary
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sheet tab named 'Remediation_Summary' is visible at the bottom of the spreadsheet application.

task_completion.description: Populate the Remediation_Summary sheet with Team_Owners and Urgent_Patches counts
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Remediation_Summary sheet shows a list of Team_Owners (Web, Database, Infrastructure, HR_IT, Finance) in Column A and numerical counts in Column B.

integrity.description: The agent used the spreadsheet GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Calc menus, formula bar, and cells, rather than terminal commands executing a Python script.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas to calculate values
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar shows functions like VLOOKUP, IF, MIN, or arithmetic operations when cells in columns I, J, or the summary sheet are selected, rather than hardcoded numbers.

integrity.description: The agent saved the updated workbook
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the save icon or uses File -> Save in the spreadsheet application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file is located at /home/ga/Documents/vuln_scan_results.xlsx. The Scan_Data sheet must contain the following required columns: Environment, Impact, Base_Score, Exploit_Maturity, Team_Owner, Adjusted_Score, and SLA_Days.
